turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE BURGER
turns.text: The judgment and opinion of the Court in 75-1198, Nolde Brothers Incorporated against Local 358 of the Bakery and Confectionery Workers. For reasons stated and an opinion filed with the clerk this morning, the judgment of the United States Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit is affirmed. Mr. Justice Stewart, with whom Mr. Justice Rehnquist joined, filed a dissenting opinion.
